case_title: ANGELI ROSATO VS. BAO DOWN, INC AN FTB SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA CORP.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSATO, ANGELI AS TO DEFENDANT BAO DOWN, INC AN FTB SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA CORP. DBA GASTROBAR JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSATO, ANGELI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAO DOWN, INC AN FTB SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA CORP. DBA GASTROBAR $16,553.51 PRINCIPAL, $650.68 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,574.19, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
